title: Namora
content:
{{Character |image = Namora.png |real name = Namora |alias = |species = [[Talokanil]] |citizenship = [[Talokan|Talokanil]] |gender = Female |affiliation = [[Talokanil Armed Forces]] |movie = ''[[Black Panther: Wakanda Forever]]''
''[[Avengers: Doomsday]]'' (unreleased)[https://x.com/MCUFilmNews/status/1926716059769344380 MCU Film News on X - May 25, 2025] |actor = [[Mabel Cadena]] |status = Alive}} {{Quote|Baax sh'la kuusin 'ts'aantaluul? Ma'ta ts'ookole' va'chla.Translates from Yucatec Maya to: "''What's taking so long? This is not a time for games.''"|Namora to [[Attuma]]|Black Panther: Wakanda Forever}} '''Namora''' is a [[Talokanil]] warrior and a trusted confidant of [[Namor]]. ==Biography== ===Early Life=== Namora idolized [[Namor]], the king of the underwater nation of [[Talokan]] since her childhood, desiring to fight by his side. Eventually, she grew to become his second-in-command, and advised him on national matters along with fellow [[Talokanil]], [[Attuma]].{{Ref|BPWF}} ===[[Talokanil-Wakandan War]]=== ====[[Attack on the Harvey Sub-Sea]]==== [[File:Namora on Heavy Sub-Sea.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Namora with Talokanil warriors on the ''[[Harvey Sub-Sea]]'']] The [[Talokanil]] found [[United States of America|Americans]] mining for [[Vibranium]] in the oceans. They ambushed the ship and used their mind control to have many [[Humans]] jump overboard. [[Attuma]], Namora, and another Talokanil then jumped onto the boat with Attuma striking [[Smitty (Navy SEAL)|Smitty]] in the chest. [[Graham (Doctor)|Graham]] then shot at Attuma, but it did nothing, so she ran. Attuma told them to chase her. Namora and the other Talokanil chased Graham down to the helicopter pad. As the helicopter arrived, Namora tried to jump on, but was shot at, causing her to fall. Graham then lifted off with her pilot. However, they did not get far as [[Namor]] took the helicopter out of the air and threw it into the water.{{Ref|BPWF}} ====[[Chase of Riri Williams|Abducting Riri Williams]]==== {{Quote|Kíinsa'al [[Ironheart|ixmiatso]]. Ak'tatin'la kene-lokto."Translates from Yucatec Maya to: "''Kill the scientist. I'll deal with the witnesses.''"
"Chan ma'tolm."Translates from Yucatec Maya to: "''OK.''"|Namora and [[Attuma]]|Black Panther: Wakanda Forever}} [[File:Talokanil.png|{{AltFloat}}|Namora with Attuma in [[Cambridge]]]] [[Namor]] met with [[Ramonda]] and gave her an ultimatum to help him kill the scientist who made a [[Vibranium Detector]]. Worried that they would help the scientist rather than kill her, Namor sent the troops out to [[Cambridge]], [[Massachusetts]]. The [[Talokanil]] arrived on their giant whale and attacked [[Shuri]], [[Okoye]], and [[Riri Williams]]. They threw a [[Hydrobomb]] at the group, causing them to flip over. As [[Attuma]] fought Okoye, Namora ran to take care of the police. Namora did so and easily killed them using her [[Talokanil Spear|spear]] skills. When she returned, she saw that Okoye was still not defeated. Annoyed, she told Attuma to stop playing games and threw him a water bomb. Attuma then deflected it into Okoye, sending her off the bridge. They then took Shuri to [[Talokan]].{{Ref|BPWF}} ====Welcoming Shuri and Meeting in Capital City==== [[File:Namora Rise Talokan.png|{{AltFloat}}|Namora and the [[Talokanil]] preparing for the attack]] {{Quote|K'uch-o'b ta lo' waale’ kalikil techk'askuntik [[Ramonda|Ahau]]? Wach'lo'b ma ikok'sa uld'okan kuyuchul. Tsikbanak [[Shuri|Ajaw]] ka il-aak otoch. Ma'shla ts'ookole' yuchul ta wo’lal [[Talokan]] an in talel?"Translates from Yucatec Maya to: "''They came while you spoke to the Queen? We should not have trusted her. The Princess has seen our home. What is stopping them from coming for Talokan?''"
"Teene'.Translates from Yucatec Maya to: "''I will.''"|Namora and [[Namor]]|Black Panther: Wakanda Forever}} In [[Talokan]], Namora greeted [[Riri Williams]] and [[Shuri]] in [[Namor]]'s [[Namor's Cenote|cenote]]. She gave Shuri clothes so that she could meet with Namor. Later, after Namor showed Shuri Talokan and wanted to have an alliance, Namora showed up out of the water to inform Namor that he had been summoned outside of Talokan. Not long after Shuri's [[Escape from Namor's Cenote|rescue]], an angry Namor spoke to all of Talokan, telling them they were going to [[Talokanil-Wakandan War|war]], and it was his fault that he exposed them to Shuri.{{Ref|BPWF}} ====[[Attack on Birnin Zana]]==== [[File:Namora and Namor in Wakanda.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Namora informs [[Namor]] of the status of their [[Attack on Birnin Zana|attack]]]] {{Quote|O'hool kanal'venc'hen un'ach talo'tinen mul'cha howel'na. De'ba ah'la tik'anya bit'laiye.Translates from Yucatec Maya to: "''The defenses have been lured away from the palace. It is up to you now.''"|Namora to [[Namor]]|Black Panther: Wakanda Forever}} [[Namor]] led the charge as [[Talokanil]] invaded [[Wakanda]]. They flooded the place and met with Namor on the sand. Namora knelt to him and reported that defenses had been led away, so it was Namor's turn to do his thing. [[M'Baku]] then attacked from behind, but Namor easily disposed of him before calling for more attacks. In the end, Namor killed Queen [[Ramonda]].{{Ref|BPWF}} ====[[Ambush on the Talokanil|Battle at the ''Sea Leopard'']]==== [[File:Black Panther II Trailer (46).png|{{AltFloat}}|Namora breaks the [[Wakandan Design Group|Wakandan]] sonic emitter]] {{Quote|Get off me!|[[Ironheart]] to Namora|Black Panther: Wakanda Forever}} Later, Namora and [[Attuma]] informed [[Namor]] that there was another [[Vibranium Detector]] in the ocean. They located the Vibranium Detector in the Atlantic Ocean, and Namor led his [[Talokanil Armed Forces|army]] to it. When he approached it, the detector let out a loud noise, causing Namor to order everyone to get out of the water. They all swam up, only to see the ''[[Sea Leopard]]'' above the water; it was an ambush. As everyone attacked the boat, climbing up the sides, Namora stayed below the water and found the sonic emitter. She worked hard to break it before placing a [[Hydrobomb]] in it, blowing up the emitter. The whales then arrived with loads of water bombs, which blew up the bottom of the ship, causing it to tip over as [[Black Panther]] and Namor battled in the distance. This sent [[Wakanda]]ns overboard into the water where they could get the upper hand. Namora killed many Wakandans until she saw [[Ironheart]] swimming after her. Namora then grabbed onto Ironheart, flying into the air with her. [[File:Namora vs Ironheart.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Namora fights [[Ironheart]] midair]] Namora struggled to stay on the back of Ironheart, but was able to gain the upper hand by trapping her neck with her [[Talokanil Spear|spear]]. Suddenly, Ironheart got Namora to get in front of her, using this opportunity to blast Namora with her blasters, sending Namora into the sea below and away from the boat. Soon, Namor returned, making peace with Shuri.{{Ref|BPWF}} ====Aftermath==== [[File:Namora4K.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|[[Namor]] reassures Namora on [[Talokan]]'s future]] {{Quote|Baax kat'li ul'kich' mehen?"Translates from Yucatec Maya to: "''What is troubling you, my child?''"
"Kaxtbil luxikubao'b de'caach ma'taal thex'sel tili'goshka... Chint'il b'tuul koi' binshi'kol tu'tanye Wakandan el'locho...Translates from Yucatec Maya to: "''I looked forward to fighting alongside you my entire life... The thought of you kneeling to the Wakandans...''"|[[Namor]] and Namora|Black Panther: Wakanda Forever}} In the aftermath, a disappointed Namora approached [[Namor]] in his [[Namor's Cenote|cenote]]. Namor was more at peace, now that the [[Talokanil-Wakandan War|war]] was over. She voiced her concerns, saying he said he was going to fight with her. Namor assured Namora that the new alliance was better for [[Talokan]] in the long run, especially since they could maybe rule the world together in the future.{{Ref|BPWF}} ==Powers and Abilities== ===Powers=== {{Quote|They have superhuman strength.|[[Okoye]]|Black Panther: Wakanda Forever}} *'''Talokanil Physiology''': Like all [[Talokanil]], Namora is an aquatic being with superhuman abilities such as enhanced strength, durability, speed, agility, stamina, reflexes, and accelerated healing. She is also capable of emitting a hypnotic sonic attack with her voice. **'''Enhanced Strength''': Namora possesses an enhanced strength much greater than a normal [[human]], being able to destroy a [[Vibranium]] sonic device in the ''[[Sea Leopard]]'', and holding herself in [[Ironheart]]'s back during a long time. **'''Enhanced Durability''': Namora's body is more resistant to physical damage than the body of a normal human being. **'''Enhanced Speed''': Underwater, Namora can swim and move at incredible superhuman speeds. On the surface, Namora can still move quickly, but not as fast as in the water. **'''Enhanced Agility''': In both underwater and land, Namora naturally possesses more agility, balance, and body coordination than a normal human being. **'''Enhanced Stamina''': ''To be added'' **'''Enhanced Reflexes''': In both water and land, Namora can dodge objects traveling at high speeds, as demonstrated when she parried a policeman's bullets with her [[Talokanil Spear|spear]]. **'''Enhanced Vision''': As a being that lives underwater, Namora has very good vision, capable of seeing in water more than a regular human eye. **'''Regenerative Healing Factor''': Despite her body's resistance, Namora could still be injured like any other Talokanil. However, her metabolism enabled her to rapidly regenerate damaged bodily tissue with great speed, which is more effective when she is in contact with water. **'''Aquatic Adaptation''': Namora is capable of breathing underwater by absorbing the oxygen of the water through the gills on her neck, and her body is specially developed for underwater conditions, granting her specialized blood circulation to withstand freezing temperatures. She possesses a highly developed vision to see clearly even in the near-total darkness of the ocean floor, and can also hear underwater as well as humans do on land. **'''Aquatic Telepathy''': Like any other [[Talokanil]], Namora can mentally communicate with marine life and persuade them to do her bidding. **'''Hypnosis''': Namora, as well as other [[Talokanil]], can sing which can hypnotize her victims, leading them to jump into the water, where they will drown. However, this can be stopped by a loud sound. **'''Wallcrawling''': Namora is able to crawl on any type of walls. ===Abilities=== {{Quote|Líik'ik [[Talokan]]!Translates from Yucatec Maya to: "''Rise Talokan!''"|Namora|Black Panther: Wakanda Forever}} *'''Master Combatant''': ''To be added'' *'''Spear Mastery''': ''To be added'' {{Quote|Ixmejen ajao. Waaye' e'hala ix'winecobo'. Ts'ook wo’lale'x tsikbanako'n."Translates from Yucatec Maya to: "''Princess. Here royalty wears traditional clothing. We had this made for you.''"
"Do you understand her?"
"Not completely.|Namora, [[Riri Williams]], and [[Shuri]]|Black Panther: Wakanda Forever}} *'''Multilingualism''': Namora is fluent in her native Yucatec Maya, as well as English. ==Equipment== ===Weapons=== *'''[[Talokanil Spear|Spear]]''': ''To be added'' ===Other Equipment=== *'''[[Talokanil Rebreather]]''': Enables her to breathe on the land. ==Facilities== *'''[[Talokan Capital City]]''': Namora lives in the underwater city as a high ranked warrior. ==Relationships== {{Col-begin}}{{Col-2}} ===Allies=== *[[Namor]] - King *[[Attuma]] *[[Wakanda]] - Former Enemies **[[Golden Tribe]] ***[[Ramonda]] † ***[[Black Panther|Shuri/Black Panther]] - Former Captive **[[Dora Milaje]] ***[[Ayo]] ***[[Nomble]] ***[[Yama]] **[[Midnight Angels]] ***[[Okoye]] ***[[Aneka]] **[[Jabari Tribe]] ***[[M'Baku]] **[[Nakia]] **[[Wakandan Royal Guard]] *[[Ironheart|Riri Williams/Ironheart]] - Former Captive and Former Attempted Victim {{Col-2}} ===Enemies=== *[[CIA]] **[[Graham (Doctor)|Graham]] † *[[United States Navy SEALs]] **[[Smitty (Navy SEAL)|Smitty]] † **[[Henderson (Navy SEAL)|Henderson]] † *[[FBI]] *[[Cambridge Police Department]] {{Col-end}} ==Trivia== *In the comics, '''Aquaria Nautica Neptunia''' is the daughter of an [[w:c:marvel:Atlanteans (Homo mermanus)|Atlantean]] man and a surface woman, who was later nicknamed '''Namora''' in honor to her cousin [[Namor]]. ==Behind the Scenes== *[[Angela Cipra]] was a stunt double for [[Mabel Cadena]] in the role of Namora. ==References== {{Gallery|Namora/Gallery}} {{Wq|Namora}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel|Namora}} *{{WP|Namora}} *{{Marvel.com|characters/namora}} [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Black Panther: Wakanda Forever Characters]] [[Category:Avengers: Doomsday Characters]] [[Category:Talokanil]] [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Black Hair]] [[Category:Brown Eyes]] [[Category:Multilingual Characters]] [[Category:High Body Count]] [[es:Aquaria Neptunia]]
